suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Create or document the docs-worker skill. Multiple workers (update-main-skill, update-sub-skills, update-readme, update-contributing, update-changelog, fix-contributing-env-var) referenced a 'docs-worker' skill that doesn't exist in .factory/skills/. Workers handled this by proceeding based on mission context.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature update-main-skill: 'The docs-worker skill referenced in the feature does not exist'. This pattern appears across all docs features.
